run: MANUAL-VERIFICATION Stage-2 PROD-VERIFY SWEEP batch-4 (story-bank, dashboard) + batch-5 (email-center)

disposable_account.temp_pro_grant: DB-only entitlement grant on this disposable account (NOT Stripe), governance-logged in ENTITLEMENT-GRANT-LEDGER.md, reverted byte-for-byte

epistemic_note: Every verdict below is [VERIFIED-WITH-FRESH-EVIDENCE] from THIS run: Playwright/Chromium drove the real production UI (screenshots), curl probed live API endpoints server-side, and psql read/verified the dedicated aether DB. Prior-phase reports were treated as testimony, not evidence. Independent choices: different disposable account + fresh session, isolated the MV-story-bank-002 blowout to its own STAR-field scope (title path is separately-filed MV-story-bank-008), concurrent-tab variant for MV-dashboard-009, seeded 12 real EmailThread rows to exercise the connected/real-AI path and prove the '—' badge is never a fabricated 0.

findings.note: [VERIFIED-WITH-FRESH-EVIDENCE] /dashboard/stories body text contains NO 'Import from Portfolio' AND no 'portfolio' substring at all (import_from_portfolio_present:false, any_portfolio_word:false). The only import affordance is 'Import from Resume' (empty-state), which triggers the real POST /agents/story-extractor/run. No misleading import copy.

[VERIFIED-WITH-FRESH-EVIDENCE] Pasted a ~2000-char unbroken string into a STAR field (Situation) with a short title: document.documentElement.scrollWidth=1440 == innerWidth=1440, ZERO elements wider than viewport. STAR fields in story-card.tsx are contained (break-words + min-w-0 grid tracks). NOTE: My initial conflated test (long string in BOTH title+STAR) blew out via story-aside.tsx match.title — that is a DISTINCT surface, tracked separately as MV-story-bank-008 (LOW) and does NOT reopen -002, whose scope is the STAR fields.

[VERIFIED-WITH-FRESH-EVIDENCE] Delete → native confirm dialog (type='confirm') whose message NAMES the story: 'Delete "VB45 LONGSTRING…"? This cannot be undone.' Dismiss (Cancel) keeps the story (cards 1->1); Accept deletes it (cards 1->0). Confirmation precedes deletion in both paths.

[VERIFIED-WITH-FRESH-EVIDENCE] /dashboard/agents Agent Orchestration header contains NO 'uptime' and NO '99.8' (both false). It shows real, prop-derived counts: '8 agents online · 0 tasks in queue'. The removed fabricated 'uptime 99.8%' literal is gone.

[VERIFIED-WITH-FRESH-EVIDENCE] Concurrent-tab variant: created a real ApprovalRequest via POST /approvals, resolved it out-of-band (POST /approvals/{id}/approve -> 200), then clicked the now-stale Approve in the Needs Approval widget. Toast + inline alert both read 'This request was already handled — no action needed.' honest_copy_present:true, raw_http_or_json_leaked:false (no HTTP method, no /approvals endpoint, no {"detail"} JSON, no status code). Inline feed-approve is gated on the live pending set, so a resolved approval offers no live control.

[VERIFIED-WITH-FRESH-EVIDENCE] At 390x844: header box top:0/bottom:64; greeting h1 top:14/bottom:33 and subtitle p top:33/bottom:50 are BOTH fully inside the header (greeting_clipped:false, subtitle_clipped:false). Horizontal overflow 0px. truncate + min-w-0 + min-h header prevents the prior clip.

[VERIFIED-WITH-FRESH-EVIDENCE] At 390px the identity-chip name/role text is hidden (chip_name_visible:false via max-lg:hidden), while the avatar stays visible and the 'Account menu' button is reachable and opens to a reachable 'Sign out' (sign_out_reachable:true). Redundant chip text removed on mobile without losing the menu.

[VERIFIED-WITH-FRESH-EVIDENCE] Sidebar plan/quota card renders 'Pro' + '0/100 runs this period', sourced from the live GET /billing/subscription ({plan:{id:pro,name:Pro}, quota:{runsUsed:0,runsAllowed:100,spendCapUsd:15}}). Real billing data — no fabricated numbers, no Math.random. (Values reflect the temporary DB Pro grant on the disposable account, since reverted.)

[VERIFIED-WITH-FRESH-EVIDENCE] With 12 seeded un-triaged threads: ALL 12 score badges render '—' (em-dash), NO literal '0' (any_literal_zero:false); GET /workspaces/emails/inbox returns score:null for every thread. Detail panel before analysis shows 'Not analyzed yet…'. Clicking 'Analyze this thread' invoked the REAL emailAgent (AETHER_LLM_MODE=auto) and returned a genuine 'AI Intelligence · score 85' with 6 breakdown bars. No fabricated 0 shown as data; the real score appears only after analysis.

[VERIFIED-WITH-FRESH-EVIDENCE] 'AI Draft Reply' reachable and produced a REAL 305-char resume-grounded draft. Opening the send gate and clicking 'Confirm & Send' produced NO fake 'sent' (fake_sent_shown:false, sent_notice:null) — instead the honest error 'No email provider connected — connect your Gmail account to send. No email has been sent.' Server-side confirmed: POST /workspaces/emails/send -> 409 with the same message BEFORE any DB write.

[VERIFIED-WITH-FRESH-EVIDENCE] Default tab is 'All Recruiter' (inbox-tab-all aria-pressed:true); the permanently-empty-prone 'Priority' tab is NOT default (aria-pressed:false), though it remains first visually. Empty states are honest ('No emails in this view.' / 'Run AI Triage to sort your inbox into this tab.' / 'Trash is empty.').

[VERIFIED-WITH-FRESH-EVIDENCE] With 12 threads the inbox list is scrollable: scrollHeight 1402 > clientHeight 630 (max-h-[70vh] overflow-y-auto), and scrolling programmatically moved scrollTop 0 -> 772. 12 message cards rendered.

[VERIFIED-WITH-FRESH-EVIDENCE] Stats are REAL/honest — disconnected: all zeros; with 12 seeded threads GET inbox stats returned received:12 (= seeded count) and recruiterEmails:5 (= priority+followup classifications), i.e. derived from real rows, not fabricated. Connection copy is correct in BOTH states: disconnected shows 'Connect Gmail' + 'Connect your Gmail account to see your inbox here.'; a connected account shows the account chip with PRIMARY badge, status 'connected', and the button flips to 'Add Gmail Account'. No false 'connected' claim.

[VERIFIED-WITH-FRESH-EVIDENCE] Named sender (Priya Sharma / Northwind Talent) renders a REAL 'Find on LinkedIn' people-search link: https://www.linkedin.com/search/results/people/?keywords=Priya%20Sharma%20Northwind%20Talent (is_people_search:true, not the bare linkedin.com/). An unnamed sender ('Unknown') correctly OMITS the link (count 0). No fabricated profile link.

adversarial_notes: MV-story-bank-002 rigor: a naive test (long string in BOTH title and STAR field) DID blow the page to ~19235px, but isolation proved the STAR field alone is contained (1440px) and the title-only path blows out (16282px) via story-aside.tsx match.title — a surface DISTINCT from -002's scope, already filed by the orchestrator as MV-story-bank-008 (LOW). -002 stays CLOSED; -008 remains its own open LOW finding (not in this batch's assignment).

MV-dashboard-009 was proven with a genuine concurrent-resolution race (out-of-band API approve while the browser held a stale card), the strongest variant, and the toast never leaked HTTP method/endpoint/JSON.
Email real-AI path was exercised with real LLM calls (score 85, 305-char draft) on seeded DB threads, then fully cleaned up.
